title: solidDryer operation
description: Contact / through-circulation solid dryer. A wet solid is dried toward the equilibrium moisture set by the air relative humidity and the solid's GAB sorption isotherm: X_final = min(X_in, X_eq). Computes the water removed and the duty.

airTemperature.title: Drying-air temperature
airTemperature.description: Temperature of the drying air; sets the sorption isotherm.

relativeHumidity.title: Drying-air relative humidity
relativeHumidity.description: Relative humidity (water activity) of the drying air; the GAB isotherm sets the equilibrium moisture X_eq from it.
